query_text: the lightest ski that still has good edge grip and stability for groomed runs

results.explanation: K2 Disruption 78C strongly matches on: edge_grip. Moderate match on: stiffness, stability_at_speed. Review: "has enough edge grip for confident turns" Review: "good enough edge grip for basic carving" Review: "not tiring"

Head Easy Joy SLR strongly matches on: stiffness. Moderate match on: edge_grip, stability_at_speed. Review: "on smooth groomed runs they're wonderful" Review: "Limited to groomed terrain at slow speeds — that's exactly right for beginners."

Moderate match on: stiffness, edge_grip, stability_at_speed. Review: "Soft flex makes it easy to control at slow speeds." Review: "forgiving flex pattern" Review: "Edge grip is acceptable on groomed but struggles on hard snow."

ground_truth.reason: 1350g very light, but edge grip only 5 and stability 3
1550g moderate, edge grip 8, stability 7 — best balance
1580g moderate, edge grip 8, stability 8 — excellent balance
1650g moderate, edge grip 7, stability 6 — decent balance
